recommendations.title: Scorched Earth
recommendations.overview: In a post-apocalyptic future, bounty hunter Attica Gage pursues a ruthless outlaw at the head of a dangerous criminal gang.

recommendations.title: Laws of Attraction
recommendations.overview: Amidst a sea of litigation, two New York City divorce lawyers find love.

recommendations.title: Antitrust
recommendations.overview: A computer programmer's dream job at a hot Portland-based firm turns nightmarish when he discovers his boss has a secret and ruthless means of dispatching anti-trust problems.

recommendations.title: Sliding Doors
recommendations.overview: Helen, a London ad executive, is fired from her job and rushes out to catch a train, but, as she runs down, her life suddenly splits off. In one version she catches the train; in the second, she misses it. Her whole life changes in that one second, a

recommendations.title: 12 Angry Men

recommendations.title: Radio Rebel
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Drama, Family, TV Movie, Music
recommendations.overview: High school senior Tara is so painfully shy that she dreads speaking to anyone in the hallways or getting called on in class. But in the privacy of her bedroom with her iPod in hand, she rocks out -- doing mock broadcasts for Miami's hottest FM radio

recommendations.title: Johnny English
recommendations.overview: A lowly pencil pusher working for MI7, Johnny English is suddenly promoted to super spy after Agent One is assassinated and every other agent is blown up at his funeral. When a billionaire entrepreneur sponsors the exhibition of the Crown Jewels—and

recommendations.title: Law Abiding Citizen
recommendations.overview: A frustrated man decides to take justice into his own hands after a plea bargain sets one of his family's killers free. He targets not only the killer but also the district attorney and others involved in the deal.

recommendations.title: Batman: The Long Halloween, Part Two
recommendations.overview: As Gotham City's young vigilante, the Batman, struggles to pursue a brutal serial killer, district attorney Harvey Dent gets caught in a feud involving the criminal family of the Falcones.

recommendations.title: Mea Culpa
recommendations.overview: A criminal defense attorney must choose between family, duty and her own dangerous desires when she takes on the case of an artist accused of murder.
